post.content:
Phone interview :
1. Phone interview 1 
	Scaling and design challenges
	Re architecture, leadership 
	Given integer, return next minimum palindrome
	[Next Palindrome Using Same Digits - LeetCode](https://leetcode.com/problems/next-palindrome-using-same-digits/)


Onsite : 

1. Coding
[Task Scheduler - LeetCode](https://leetcode.com/problems/task-scheduler/)
Print the sequence of tasks

2. Coding
[Given a character limit and a | CareerCup](https://www.careercup.com/question?id=5100595952222208)
Word break into chunks with sequence tag at end

3. Design - Previously solved challenge
4. Design - new challenge - 
		Design Prime Video customer subscription
		One customer can invite other customers (share subscription)
		High scale checkSubscription api
		Handle update subscription status
`What is previously solved challenge?` - Project walk through?\n\nWhat level was the interview for?
how did you approach system design problem?
Could you please elaborate on Scaling and design challenges, Re architecture, leadership for the phone round? Is it design challenges faced at the current job?\n
For onsite coding 1st round, isnt it similar to https://leetcode.com/problems/rearrange-string-k-distance-apart/? Is that what you mean?
